relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: James greets the scattered tribes with joy.
Trials can become ground for deep joy.
Tested trust produces endurance.
Endurance matures the soul into wholeness.
Wisdom is asked from the generous Divine.
Trust asks without being split by waves.
The divided request receives nothing solid.
Double-souled life becomes unstable.
The lowly sibling is lifted.
The rich learn lowliness as wealth fades.
Beauty without root withers in heat.
Endurance receives the crown of life.
The Divine does not lure anyone into harm.
Desire itself can draw and entice.
Misaligned desire births death when completed.
Beloved siblings are warned against deception.
Every complete gift descends from the Father of lights.
The word of truth births firstfruits.
Be swift to hear, slow to speak, slow to anger.
Human anger does not make Divine justice.
Receive the implanted word in gentleness.
Do the word, do not only hear it.
Hearing without doing forgets the mirror.
The face seen is quickly forgotten.
The Law of freedom blesses the doer.
Unbridled speech empties reverence.
Pure reverence visits orphans and widows in pressure and keeps integrity.

contemplative_note: James 1 is embodied wisdom: receive the word, do it, bridle speech, and let pure reverence become care for the vulnerable.
